name: AOL Inc.
description: AOL Inc. is an American web portal and online service provider based in New York City. Originally known as America Online, it was a pioneer of the internet in the mid-1990s, providing dial-up internet access, email, instant messaging, and web portal services to millions of users. Today, AOL operates as a digital media company, offering a suite of content brands, products, and services, and is a subsidiary of Yahoo! Inc. (formerly Verizon Media).
